name: starcoin-transfer-workflow
description: Plugin bundle that packages a user-in-the-loop Starcoin transfer workflow for an agentic host.

interface.shortDescription: User-approved Starcoin transfers through local runtimes.
interface.longDescription: Uses a transfer skill plus local scripts and CLIs to keep prepare, confirm, sign, submit, and watch steps bound together for an agentic host without requiring plugin-managed MCP servers.
defaultPrompt: List Starcoin wallets and chain context for a transfer.
Prepare a Starcoin transfer and wait for my approval.
Track a pending Starcoin transaction by hash.
